name: astrid
description: Run Claude Code as an Astrid agent — capsule tools over MCP, governed by the Astrid runtime. Installing this plugin turns a vanilla `claude` REPL into an Astrid-integrated session.

principal.title: Astrid principal
principal.description: The Astrid principal this Claude Code session acts as. Scopes tool execution and capability checks to this identity. Leave blank to use the active/default principal.
